records.name: Cold-side heat duty
records.notes: Approved for project decision-support use. Cold-side basis and crude-property correlation must be re-reviewed if feed properties or instrumentation change.

records.name: Normalized heat duty
records.source: production notebook chain; project owner confirmation 2026-07-21
records.notes: Approved as a throughput-normalized performance signal only; it is not a direct fouling-resistance measurement.

records.name: E112C and E113A parallel alternate position
records.notes: Approved project topology: both use 1TI115 to 1TI116 and total charge. Re-review against any revised P&ID or valve lineup.

records.name: E101G flow and service state
records.value: total_charge - E101AB - E101CD - E101EF branch flows
records.source: Operating_State.csv production logic; project owner confirmation 2026-07-21
records.notes: Approved inference method. E101G has no direct temperature or flow instrumentation and must always remain labelled INFERRED.

records.name: Local condition versus single-HX network consequence diagnostic
records.value: Q_norm P90 clean envelope vs latest-30 median; join to audited single-HX CIT recovery; CR = 1 - CIT-equivalent-duty/local-Q-loss
records.source: supplied CPHT end-to-end concept; src/network/attribution.py; pipeline/export_network_diagnostics.py
records.notes: Diagnostic only. Pair/multi-HX interaction and thermal temperature propagation are not estimated. Must pass confirmed cleaning-event backtesting before approval.

records.name: Hybrid empirical clean-response and datasheet diagnostic network model
records.value: Chronological clean-state model per HX; three CPHT-2 branches; flow-weighted mixing; E113A/E112C active terminal; clean-one and pairwise counterfactuals
records.notes: Covers 16 network positions represented by 17 assets because E113A/E112C share one alternate terminal position. Scheduler replacement remains prohibited until all acceptance gates pass.
